creator: r.welz@pro2col.de
text:
Hello.

So there are some linux ditributions which uses /etc/services from FreeBSD, may I ask why port 1886 leoip is missing? I need to work with that port on several os, Mac OS X, several Linux. 

Is there a reason why port 1886 is missing?

Thank you for your valuable time,

kind regards,

Robert Welz

How-To-Repeat: /etc/services port 1886 is missing
